$comment: opencode-memory plugin configuration. Copy this file to memory.config.json and edit as needed.

recall.$comment: Two-stage recall: rule filter (free) + LLM rerank (one call)

extraction.$comment: KAIROS mode: main agent appends logs, extraction runs on session.idle

dream.$comment: Periodic consolidation: Orient -> Gather -> Consolidate -> Prune

scope.$comment: Cross-project memory: user scope stores global preferences, project scope stores per-project context

models.$comment: Model overrides per task. If omitted, uses oh-my-openagent agent/category defaults. These take priority over agent/category.

experimental.$comment: Opt-in features that change core contracts. All default false. See docs/superpowers/specs/v0.3.4/
